description: Slicebox is software for safe sharing and access to medical images, particularly DICOM data. The slicebox.github.io site serves the published API documentation and Swagger/OpenAPI specification for that product.
summary: slicebox.github.io publishes one REST/OpenAPI surface for the Slicebox API, with public docs and machine-readable Swagger/OpenAPI files; authentication details are not clearly specified in the published spec/docs.
